positive: A whimsical forest creature, blending elements of a fox, raven, and hummingbird, perched on an overgrown branch. The creature has iridescent feathers and soft, flowing fur, glowing subtly with bioluminescent accents. It is framed by dense, stylized fantasy foliage (ferns, ivy, glowing mushrooms) and glowing, stylized flora. The overall scene should feature deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with warm gold and ivory highlights. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered for maximal print impact. Vector art style, intricate linework, clean silhouettes, high contrast, ethereal, maximalist, kawaii aesthetic, perfect for apparel print, flat vector illustration, digital ink painting, clean lines, UHD, studio lighting.
